name: vitals-entry-form
title: Vitals Entry Form
description: A full vitals set in one card, each row a single-vital field, with completeness and a live summary.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Initial values; any subset of { takenAt, bp, hr, rr, temp, spo2, glucose }.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires on any edit with the whole observation set.

clinicalNotes: Partial vitals are valid and common — the form never requires the full set, and the completeness indicator reports coverage without gating. The whole set is timestamped (takenAt) rather than assuming "now", and per-row context (e.g. glucose fasting/post-meal, temperature site) is captured by the reused single-vital fields rather than assumed. Emits one structured observation set; canonical units follow each field (°C, kg/cm, mmHg).
notes: Round-2 composite; reuses blood-pressure-input, temperature-field (label suppressed), glucose-log-input + spo2-dial/blood-pressure-badge for the live summary, in a card with a progress completeness bar. "Taken at" is a themed DateField + time input (not native datetime-local).
